title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 104.080 - Member may retire when — waiver of monthly annuity, when
text:
104.080.  Member may retire when — waiver of monthly annuity, when. — Each member may retire the first of the month following the month during which such member shall reach normal retirement age with a normal annuity.  Notwithstanding any other provisions to the contrary, a person receiving an annuity may waive monthly annuity payments or a cost-of-living adjustment (COLA) for periods of time, provided no waiver may be contrary to applicable federal law.  A waiver shall be final as to any payment or COLA waived.
(L. 1955 p. 718 § 17, A.L. 1982 H.B. 1720, et al., A.L. 1988 H.B. 1643 & 1399, A.L. 2004 H.B. 1440)
